testcase.name: main.ts > mountMediaField > mounts a Vue app on the given element
main.ts > mountMediaField > reads config from data attributes
main.ts > mountMediaField > reads translations with defaults when data-translations is absent
main.ts > mountMediaField > reads custom translations from data-translations
main.ts > mountAttachedMediaField > reads attached config including uploadAction and tempUploadFolder
main.ts > mountAttachedMediaField > handles missing attached-specific attributes gracefully
main.ts > mountGalleryMediaField > mounts a gallery field on the element
main.ts > readConfig (via mountMediaField) > parses paths JSON
main.ts > readConfig (via mountMediaField) > handles invalid JSON for paths without throwing
main.ts > readConfig (via mountMediaField) > reads boolean attributes correctly
main.ts > readTranslations (via mountMediaField) > falls back to defaults when data-translations is missing
main.ts > readTranslations (via mountMediaField) > falls back to defaults when data-translations contains invalid JSON
main.ts > readTranslations (via mountMediaField) > merges custom translations over defaults
main.ts > autoMount > auto-mounts elements with data-media-field-type on import
main.ts > autoMount > auto-mounts multiple element types
main.ts > autoMount > skips elements that are already mounted
main.ts > autoMount > ignores elements with unknown media-field-type
GalleryCardItem > renders for normal image item
GalleryCardItem > renders file icon for non-image
GalleryCardItem > shows transient warning
GalleryCardItem > shows not-found error
GalleryCardItem > hidden when isRemoved
GalleryCardItem > emits editMediaText on button click
GalleryCardItem > emits editAnchor on button click
GalleryCardItem > emits deleteMedia on trash click
GalleryCardItem > uses 120px thumb size for 'sm'
GalleryCardItem > uses 240px thumb size for 'lg'
GalleryCardItem > shows filled comment icon when mediaText exists
GalleryCardItem > shows outline comment icon when no mediaText
GalleryContainer > renders in grid view by default
GalleryContainer > shows add card in grid view
GalleryContainer > toggles to list view on button click
GalleryContainer > shows 'Add media' empty item in list when no items
GalleryContainer > renders all items including duplicates
GalleryContainer > filters out isRemoved items
GalleryContainer > emits showPicker on add button click
GalleryContainer > emits reorder on drag-drop (test via component method call)
GalleryContainer > saves/loads view prefs from localStorage
GalleryContainer > enforces single item for non-multiple mode (watch fires reorder)
GalleryContainer > handles invalid localStorage gracefully (catch block)
GalleryContainer > onDragEnd resets draggedItem
GalleryContainer > grid size toggle between sm and lg
GalleryListItem > renders media name for normal item
GalleryListItem > shows 'Temporarily unavailable' for transient error
GalleryListItem > shows 'Media not found' for not-found error
GalleryListItem > hidden when isRemoved is true
GalleryListItem > shows image thumbnail for image mime
GalleryListItem > shows icon for non-image
GalleryListItem > shows mediaText button when allowMediaText and no error
GalleryListItem > hides mediaText button when error
GalleryListItem > shows anchor button for images when allowAnchors
GalleryListItem > hides anchor button for non-images
GalleryListItem > emits editMediaText on button click
GalleryListItem > emits editAnchor on button click
GalleryListItem > emits deleteMedia on trash click
GalleryListItem > is draggable when allowMultiple
GalleryListItem > is not draggable when allowMultiple is false
MediaFieldAttached > renders hidden input with serialized paths
MediaFieldAttached > loadInitialPaths works
MediaFieldAttached > loadInitialPaths batches requests when mediaItemsUrl is configured
MediaFieldAttached > handles file input change (onFileInputChange)
MediaFieldAttached > handles drag-drop (onDrop)
MediaFieldAttached > handleFiles calls uploadService.uploadFiles
MediaFieldAttached > handleFiles adds uploaded items to mediaItems
MediaFieldAttached > canAddMedia false for single mode with item
MediaFieldAttached > removeSelected works
MediaFieldAttached > onDocumentClick deselects when clicking outside images
MediaFieldAttached > onDocumentClick does not deselect when clicking an image thumbnail
MediaFieldAttached > drag zone shows overlay when dragging over
MediaFieldAttached > serializedPaths includes isNew, isRemoved, attachedFileName
MediaFieldAttached > loadInitialPaths handles 404 as not-found error
MediaFieldAttached > loadInitialPaths handles network error as transient
MediaFieldAttached > loadInitialPaths with empty paths sets initialized
MediaFieldAttached > onDrop does nothing when no files in dataTransfer
MediaFieldAttached > onFileInputChange does nothing when no files selected
MediaFieldAttached > selectAndDeleteMedia selects then removes item
MediaFieldAttached > onReorder updates mediaItems order
MediaFieldAttached > cancelMediaText does not change mediaText
MediaFieldAttached > saveMediaText saves editingMediaText to selected item
MediaFieldAttached > showAnchorModal / saveAnchor / resetAnchor / cancelAnchor work
MediaFieldAttached > cancelAnchor does not modify anchor
MediaFieldAttached > persists smallThumbs preference to localStorage
MediaFieldAttached > handles invalid mediaFieldPrefs in localStorage gracefully
MediaFieldAttached > handleFiles in single mode replaces existing item
MediaFieldAttached > handleFiles logs warning when there are upload errors
MediaFieldAttached > removeSelected else-if branch: removes single item when nothing selected
MediaFieldAttached > setAnchor updates editingAnchor from mouse position
MediaFieldAttached > setAnchor does nothing when anchorImageRef is null
MediaFieldAttached > handleFiles with multiple uploads in single mode keeps only first
MediaFieldAttached > dragover and dragleave toggle isDraggingOver
MediaFieldBasic > renders hidden input with serialized paths
MediaFieldBasic > serializedPaths returns config.paths before initialization
MediaFieldBasic > serializedPaths returns mediaItems after initialization
MediaFieldBasic > loadInitialPaths fetches media details from API
MediaFieldBasic > loadInitialPaths handles 404 as not-found error
MediaFieldBasic > loadInitialPaths handles network error as transient
MediaFieldBasic > loadInitialPaths batches requests when mediaItemsUrl is configured
MediaFieldBasic > loadInitialPaths with empty paths sets initialized
MediaFieldBasic > addMediaFiles adds items for multiple mode
MediaFieldBasic > addMediaFiles replaces for single mode
MediaFieldBasic > addMediaFiles ignores duplicate mediaPath entries
MediaFieldBasic > removeSelected removes selected item
MediaFieldBasic > selectMedia sets selectedMedia
MediaFieldBasic > selectMedia deselects when clicking the same image twice
MediaFieldBasic > canAddMedia false when single and has item
MediaFieldBasic > canAddMedia true when multiple
MediaFieldBasic > shows Remove button when selectedMedia
MediaFieldBasic > shows Media Text button when selectedMedia and allowMediaText
MediaFieldBasic > shows Anchor button when selectedMedia, allowAnchors, and image type
MediaFieldBasic > smallThumbs toggle changes thumbSize
MediaFieldBasic > selectAndDeleteMedia selects then removes item
MediaFieldBasic > onReorder updates mediaItems order
MediaFieldBasic > addMediaFiles with single file for single mode
MediaFieldBasic > showPicker button is disabled when canAddMedia is false
MediaFieldBasic > onPickerSelect adds files via addMediaFiles
MediaFieldBasic > onPickerSelect keeps only one item in single mode
MediaFieldBasic > cancelMediaText does not change mediaText
MediaFieldBasic > saveMediaText saves editingMediaText to selected item
MediaFieldBasic > showAnchorModal / saveAnchor / resetAnchor / cancelAnchor
MediaFieldBasic > cancelAnchor does not modify anchor
MediaFieldBasic > persists smallThumbs to localStorage on change
MediaFieldBasic > handles invalid mediaFieldPrefs in localStorage gracefully
MediaFieldBasic > auto-selects first item in single mode on initial load
MediaFieldBasic > onDocumentClick deselects when clicking outside
MediaFieldBasic > onDocumentClick does NOT deselect when clicking inside .mf-thumb-item
MediaFieldBasic > setAnchor updates editingAnchor from mouse position
MediaFieldBasic > cancelMediaText closes modal via direct call
MediaFieldBasic > cancelAnchor closes modal via direct call
MediaFieldBasic > removeSelected removes single item when nothing is selected
MediaFieldBasic > showPicker calls pickerModalRef.open (no-op when ref is stub)
MediaFieldBasic > showPicker does nothing when canAddMedia is false
MediaFieldBasic > showMediaTextModal does nothing when no selectedMedia
MediaFieldBasic > saveMediaText updates mediaText on selectedMedia via direct call
MediaFieldBasic > onPickerSelect adds files via addMediaFiles
MediaFieldBasic > onBeforeUnmount removes document click listener

MediaFieldGallery > loadInitialPaths works
MediaFieldGallery > addMediaFiles adds for multiple, replaces for single
MediaFieldGallery > addMediaFiles ignores duplicate mediaPath entries
MediaFieldGallery > selectAndDeleteMedia removes item
MediaFieldGallery > onReorder updates mediaItems

MediaFieldGallery > showPicker calls pickerModalRef.open
MediaFieldGallery > onEditMediaText sets selectedMedia and opens modal
MediaFieldGallery > saveMediaText updates mediaText
MediaFieldGallery > onEditAnchor sets selectedMedia and opens anchor modal
MediaFieldGallery > saveAnchor updates anchor

MediaFieldGallery > cancelMediaText closes modal without saving (via exposed state)
MediaFieldGallery > cancelAnchor closes modal without saving (via exposed state)
MediaFieldGallery > loadInitialPaths handles 404 as not-found
MediaFieldGallery > loadInitialPaths handles network error as transient
MediaFieldGallery > loadInitialPaths with empty paths sets initialized
MediaFieldGallery > selectAndDeleteMedia clears selectedMedia when deleting selected item
MediaFieldGallery > addMediaFiles with single file in single mode
MediaFieldGallery > onEditAnchor defaults to center when no anchor exists
MediaFieldGallery > serializedPaths returns config.paths before initialization
MediaFieldGallery > loadInitialPaths treats non-404 HTTP errors as transient
MediaFieldGallery > setAnchor updates editingAnchor from mouse position
MediaFieldGallery > setAnchor does nothing when anchorImageRef is null
MediaFieldGallery > cancelMediaText closes modal directly
MediaFieldGallery > cancelAnchor closes modal directly
MediaFieldGallery > serializedPaths maps mediaItems after initialization
MediaFieldGallery > showPicker calls pickerModalRef.open
MediaFieldGallery > onPickerSelect adds files
MediaFieldGallery > onPickerSelect keeps only one item in single mode
MediaPickerModal > initially not visible
MediaPickerModal > opens via exposed open() method
MediaPickerModal > shows loading state initially
MediaPickerModal > shows error when media-gallery import fails

testcase.name: MediaPickerModal > emits select with converted IMediaFieldItem[] on confirm
MediaPickerModal > cancel closes modal
MediaPickerModal > cleanup unmounts picker on close
MediaPickerModal > OK button disabled when no selection
MediaPickerModal > passes allowMultiple to media picker mount config
MediaPickerModal > passes allowedExtensions to media picker mount config
MediaPickerModal > onSelectionChange callback updates selectedCount
MediaPickerModal > confirm emits only one item when allowMultiple is false
MediaPickerModal > confirm filters out files that do not match allowedExtensions
ThumbsContainer > shows 'No Files' empty state when mediaItems is empty
ThumbsContainer > renders visible items (filters out isRemoved)
ThumbsContainer > shows image preview for image mime types
ThumbsContainer > shows icon for non-image files
ThumbsContainer > applies active class on selected item
ThumbsContainer > emits selectMedia on item click
ThumbsContainer > emits deleteMedia on trash button click
ThumbsContainer > shows transient error state with warning icon
ThumbsContainer > shows not-found error state with ban icon
ThumbsContainer > strips GUID prefix from name when isNew is true (substring(36))
ThumbsContainer > emits reorder with rearranged array on drop
ThumbsContainer > does not allow drag when allowMultiple is false
ThumbsContainer > onDragEnd resets draggedItem (subsequent drop is no-op)
ThumbsContainer > buildMediaUrl appends width/height params (check img src)
ThumbsContainer > emits deleteMedia on trash click for transient error item
ThumbsContainer > emits deleteMedia on trash click for not-found error item
ThumbsContainer > onDragStart sets dataTransfer.effectAllowed when dataTransfer exists
UploadList > is hidden when files array is empty (v-show)
UploadList > shows header with upload count
UploadList > shows error count when errors exist
UploadList > shows progress bar for in-progress files
UploadList > shows check icon for successful files
UploadList > shows error message for failed files
UploadList > emits clearErrors on broom button click
UploadList > emits dismiss on X button for error entry
UploadList > toggles expanded/collapsed on header click
UploadList > shows dismissAll X button when no pending uploads
UploadList > emits dismissAll on X button click
useFieldUpload > returns reactive files ref that is initially empty
useFieldUpload > clearErrors > removes only entries with error messages
useFieldUpload > dismiss > removes the specific entry
useFieldUpload > dismissAll > clears all entries
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > returns uploaded result on successful upload
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > uses filePath when XHR response omits mediaPath
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > captures server-side file error
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > handles HTTP error status
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > handles network error
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > handles invalid JSON response
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > handles empty files array in response
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > tracks upload progress percentage
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles > opens XHR with correct method and URL
useFieldUpload > anti-forgery token > reads token from DOM input and includes it in FormData
useFieldUpload > anti-forgery token > returns empty string when no token input exists in DOM
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > uses TUS when tusEnabled is true
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > uses filePath when TusFileInfo omits mediaPath
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > handles TUS progress event
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > rejects when TUS response has no uploadURL
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > rejects when TUS file info request fails
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > rejects when TUS file info fetch throws a network error
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > handles TUS upload-error event
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > handles TUS upload-error with null error
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > uses default chunk size when maxUploadChunkSize is 0
useFieldUpload > uploadFiles with TUS enabled > uses configured chunk size when maxUploadChunkSize > 0
useFieldUpload > auto-remove on success > schedules entry removal via setTimeout and callback removes entry
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .jpg
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .jpeg
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .png
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .gif
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .webp
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .svg
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .bmp
getIconClassForFilename > image extensions > returns image icon for .ico
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns pdf icon for .pdf
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns word icon for .doc
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns word icon for .docx
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns powerpoint icon for .ppt
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns powerpoint icon for .pptx
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns excel icon for .xls
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns excel icon for .xlsx
getIconClassForFilename > document extensions > returns file icon for .csv
getIconClassForFilename > audio extensions > returns audio icon for .aac
getIconClassForFilename > audio extensions > returns audio icon for .mp3
getIconClassForFilename > audio extensions > returns audio icon for .ogg
getIconClassForFilename > video extensions > returns video icon for .avi
getIconClassForFilename > video extensions > returns video icon for .flv
getIconClassForFilename > video extensions > returns video icon for .mkv
getIconClassForFilename > video extensions > returns video icon for .mp4
getIconClassForFilename > video extensions > returns video icon for .webm
getIconClassForFilename > archive extensions > returns archive icon for .gz
getIconClassForFilename > archive extensions > returns archive icon for .zip
getIconClassForFilename > code extensions > returns code icon for .css
getIconClassForFilename > code extensions > returns code icon for .html
getIconClassForFilename > code extensions > returns code icon for .js
getIconClassForFilename > text extension > returns text icon for .txt
getIconClassForFilename > unknown and edge cases > returns default file icon for unknown extension
getIconClassForFilename > unknown and edge cases > returns default file icon for empty filename
getIconClassForFilename > unknown and edge cases > returns default file icon for filename without extension
getIconClassForFilename > case insensitivity > handles uppercase JPG
getIconClassForFilename > case insensitivity > handles uppercase PDF
getIconClassForFilename > case insensitivity > handles mixed case Png
getIconClassForFilename > sizeClass parameter > appends sizeClass when provided
getIconClassForFilename > sizeClass parameter > does not append extra space when sizeClass is empty
getIconClassForFilename > sizeClass parameter > appends sizeClass to default icon for unknown extension
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for gif
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for jpeg
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for jpg
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for png
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for webp
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for svg
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for bmp
isImageExtension > returns true for image extensions > returns true for ico
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for pdf
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for doc
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for mp3
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for mp4
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for zip
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for js
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for txt
isImageExtension > returns false for non-image extensions > returns false for csv
isImageExtension > handles leading dot
isImageExtension > is case insensitive
isImageExtension > returns false for empty string
